title: Stage 06c Observability Gate
description: Stage 6c (Observability) gate. Authored by the Platform role. Reads §9 'Observability requirements' from pipeline/brief.md (and any expansion in pipeline/design-spec.md) to extract the metrics / logs / traces the change promised to emit, then verifies each one is actually present in the shipped code. PASS requires zero gaps across all three signal categories. WARN allowed when verified ⊇ required but verification_method is weaker than 'runtime-probe' (i.e. we found references in code but didn't observe them in a real run).

required.description: Metric names the brief / design-spec promised, e.g. ['notifications_opt_in_changes_total', 'sms_sent_total'].

verified.description: Metric names confirmed to be emitted by the shipped code.

required.description: Log statements the brief / design-spec promised, identified by event-name or substring (e.g. 'opt-in changed', 'verification SMS failed').
Trace span names the design-spec promised (e.g. 'notification.opt_in.change', 'sms.send'). May be empty if the change doesn't introduce tracing.

verified.description: Span names confirmed in the code.

verification_method.description: How verification was done. 'code-grep' is the floor (find the literal name); 'runtime-probe' (actually triggered the code and saw the signal in the backend) is the ceiling. Weaker methods → WARN, not FAIL, when no gap exists.

dashboard_url.description: Optional link to the dashboard or query that proved the signals are in production / staging.
